attributes.readMe:
# Secret Recipe ## Summary The `SecretRecipe` card definition represents a secret recipe that can be used within a consuming card or field. ## Import ```javascript import { SecretRecipe } from '../secret-recipe'; ``` ## Usage as a Field To use the `SecretRecipe` spec as a field within a consuming card or field, you can add it as a `linksTo` field: ```javascript import { CardDef, field } from 'https://cardstack.com/base/card-api'; export class MyCard extends CardDef { @field('secret-recipe', { linksTo: SecretRecipe }) secretRecipe; } ``` ## Template Usage Within the template of a consuming card or field, you can display the `SecretRecipe` by accessing the `secretRecipe` field: ```handlebars

Secret Recipe

{{@fields.secretRecipe.name}}

{{@fields.secretRecipe.description}}

```
